    About Me

    Let me tell you some things...

    Here is some information about me

    I study web-development remotely online at BYU-Idaho. On my projects page there are several projects which I did for my university classes. At my work for backend I used PHP, for frontend I used HTML5, CSS, SCSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, AJAX, JSON. For database I used MariaDB which is a fork of MySQL, PostgreSQL and Elasticsearch. MariaDB was managed by me through phpMyAdmin. Aside from the technologies mentioned above at the university I also learned and used for study projects such technologies as Angular, Node.js, Express, ejs, Java, C#, ASP.NET (Razor pages and MVC), Entity Framework. I also have some knowledge and experience with Yii2 PHP framework. I study web-development remotely online at BYU-Idaho. On my projects page there are several projects which I did for my university classes. At my work for backend I used PHP, for frontend I used HTML5, CSS, SCSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, AJAX, JSON. For database I used MariaDB which is a fork of MySQL, PostgreSQL and Elasticsearch. MariaDB was managed by me through phpMyAdmin. Aside from the technologies mentioned above at the university I also learned and used for study projects such technologies as Angular, Node.js, Express, ejs, Java, C#, ASP.NET (Razor pages and MVC), Entity Framework. I also have some knowledge and experience with Yii2 PHP framework.

    Rocket-and-Space Engineering College of Oles Honchar Dnipro National University

    Graduated as a junior specialist in production of computers

    Prydniprovs'ka State Academy of Civil Engineering and Architecture
